title: veronica kiusiana subsp. miyabei
intro: Veronica kiusiana subsp. miyabei is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant is also known as a type of Japanese speedwell, which is a perennial herb with blue flowers that grow in the mountainous regions of Japan. The medicinal properties of Veronica kiusiana subsp. miyabei include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and it can be prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as being used in salves and ointments.
